title: Current directory path dekhna
use_case: Current working directory ka full path dekhne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Read-only command hai, safe hai.

title: Files aur folders list karna
use_case: Files, hidden files aur permissions dekhne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Read-only command hai, safe hai.

title: Directory change karna
use_case: Terminal me kisi folder me move karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Path galat hoga to directory change nahi hogi.

title: Folder create karna
use_case: Single ya nested folders create karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Existing important path overwrite nahi hota, but naming carefully rakho.

title: Empty file create karna
use_case: New empty file create karne ya timestamp update karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Existing file ka timestamp update ho jayega.

title: File/folder copy karna
use_case: Files ya folders copy karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Destination confirm karo, existing files overwrite ho sakti hain.

title: File/folder move ya rename karna
use_case: File rename/move karne ke liye.

title: File delete karna
use_case: Single file delete karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Delete permanent ho sakta hai, pehle file path verify karo.

title: Folder force delete karna
use_case: Folder aur andar ka data recursively delete karne ke liye.
output_explanation: Command ke output me requested information/result show hota hai. Flags ke hisaab se output change ho sakta hai.
warning: Dangerous command hai. Path 2 baar verify karo. Root path par kabhi blindly run mat karo.
